messages: {"parts":[{"content":"The drops failed before my fix was applied. Let me reset them to pending and try again:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nwith open('N5/builds/frontend-skill/meta.json') as f:\\n    meta = json.load(f)\\n\\n# Reset failed drops to pending\\nfor drop_id, info in meta['drops'].items():\\n    if info.get('status') == 'failed':\\n        info['status'] = 'pending'\\n        info.pop('failure_reason', None)\\n\\n# Clear the gate\\nmeta.pop('gate', None)\\n\\nwith open('N5/builds/frontend-skill/meta.json', 'w') as f:\\n    json.dump(meta, f, indent=2)\\n\\nprint('Reset D1.1 and D1.2 to pending')\\n\\\"\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01MDt5rM78qEhvgvBtntEgHM","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":69706,"cache_write_tokens":1051,"cache_read_tokens":68654,"output_tokens":243,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":1051,"cache_read_input_tokens":68654,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":243}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:27:07.968870Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01LA5H6GJrrHxvqGfFLskhi5","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"97a0d03b-2869-42c4-a37e-2bcbaa05238f","metadata":null}
